company.target_regions: Russia, United States, Europe, CIS countries

company.name: V-Proxies
company.description: Fast residential proxy service with global coverage, offering 99.97% uptime and instant delivery at competitive prices.
company.value_proposition: Cost-effective residential proxies - claims to be significantly cheaper than competitors (e.g., $99 vs $840 for 100GB/month vs Bright Data)

residential_rotating.notes: Starting price. Rotating residential proxies, 196+ countries, 99.97% uptime, instant delivery, SOCKS5/HTTP(S) support, unlimited concurrency. Volume discounts available.

notes: Cheapest verified residential proxy in this survey

trustpilot.notes: Limited public review data available

scamalytics.status: Not applicable - this is a proxy provider, not a target for fraud checks
scamalytics.note: Proxy providers themselves are not scored on Scamalytics

key_themes: Mentioned as high-speed residential proxy network
Rotating residential proxies with global geo-targeting

general_reputation.note: Built for developers, businesses, automation workflows

reputation.caveats: Limited public reputation data. Exercise normal caution for newer providers.

providers.notes: Verified clean IPs, safe to resell

company.name: Webshare
company.description: Webshare is a fast, affordable, and highly dependable proxy server provider for enterprise class Internet data aggregation and analysis applications.

acquisitions.details: Acquired by Oxylabs, industry leader in proxy services

company.notes: Webshare has grown to support over 60,000 paying customers including Fortune 500 companies. Known for budget-friendly pricing without compromising quality. Network covers 195 countries. Trusted by Ad Verification & Monitoring service providers.

datacenter_ipv4.notes: Shared datacenter IPv4 — 1Gbit ports. Acquired by Oxylabs 2022.

eligibility_conditions: Cancel within 2 days of original payment transaction
Plan bandwidth usage below 1GB for proxy server or static residential plans
Plan bandwidth usage below 0.1GB for rotating residential plans
Number of proxies used must be below 1,000
